heading: Fugitives from justice
label: 3290 Fugitives from justice
text: No statute of limitations shall extend to any person fleeing from justice.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on Title 18, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 583 (R.S. § 1045).Said section 583 was rephrased and made applicable to all statutes of limitation and is merely declaratory of the generally accepted rule of law.
